channel.title: Latest critical APHIS inspections of KS customers
channel.description: The latest inspections of KS customers with critical violations posted online by the U.S. Department of Agriculture's Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service

item.title: Megan Weatherman (2026-05-27)
item.description:
Direct: 1 Other Critical: 0 Not critical: 4 Teachable moments: 0
Discovered on 2026-06-25 15:09:39+00:00
